message:
feat(wasm,extensions): continued WASM host imports and extension detection refinements

Concurrent agent work:
- pi_wasm.rs: further Emscripten host import expansion and fd operation
  refinements for virtual filesystem support
- extensions.rs: minor adjustment to flat extension initializer detection
- doom-engine.ts: test fixture alignment with WASM changes
